item.title: Machining a Huge Hydraulic Cylinder Nut
item.description: A massive hydraulic cylinder nut takes shape under heavy‑duty tooling. Precision machining and raw power combine to restore this critical component. What techniques make such a demanding job possible?

media:content.media:description: A massive hydraulic cylinder nut takes shape under heavy‑duty tooling. Precision machining and raw power combine to restore this critical component. What techniques make such a demanding job possible?

item.title: Installing a Magnetic Scale on the Big Lathe
item.description: Precision takes center stage as a magnetic scale is fitted to a massive lathe. How does this upgrade transform accuracy in heavy‑duty machining?
